tasks.label: Install SPARK
tasks.detail: Copies all SPARK plugin files (agents, skills) to ~/.copilot, overwriting existing files

args: robocopy .\plugins\spark $env:USERPROFILE\.copilot /E /XF plugin.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 }

tasks.label: SparkView: Package VSIX
tasks.detail: Bumps the isolated extension patch version and packages src\spark-view\publish\spark-view-<version>.vsix

args: if (!(Test-Path .\src\spark-view\node_modules)) { npm install --prefix .\src\spark-view }; npm --prefix .\src\spark-view version patch --no-git-tag-version; npm --prefix .\src\spark-view run package
if [ ! -d src/spark-view/node_modules ]; then npm install --prefix ./src/spark-view; fi; npm --prefix ./src/spark-view version patch --no-git-tag-version; npm --prefix ./src/spark-view run package
